evals.prompt: Prevent SQL injection in PHP with PDO
evals.expected_output: $stmt = $pdo->prepare('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = :id AND email = :email'); $stmt->execute([':id' => $id, ':email' => $email]); never concatenate user input into SQL strings
$hash = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_ARGON2ID, ['memory_cost' => 65536, 'time_cost' => 4]); verify with password_verify($input, $hash); never use MD5, SHA1, SHA256 for passwords

evals.prompt: Escape user output to prevent XSS in PHP
evals.expected_output: echo htmlentities($userInput, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8'); or htmlspecialchars() in HTML context; never echo raw $_GET/$_POST/$_COOKIE; sanitize before output AND before storage

evals.prompt: Validate email input with filter_var in PHP
evals.expected_output: if (!filter_var($email, FILTER_VALIDATE_EMAIL)) throw new InvalidArgumentException(); filter_var($url, FILTER_VALIDATE_URL); filter_var($age, FILTER_VALIDATE_INT, ['options' => ['min_range' => 0]])

evals.prompt: Use password_hash with ARGON2ID in PHP
evals.expected_output: $hash = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_ARGON2ID); ARGON2ID resistant to GPU and side-channel attacks; auto-includes salt; use password_needs_rehash() to upgrade legacy hashes

evals.prompt: Secure authentication with password_verify in PHP
evals.expected_output: if (!password_verify($inputPassword, $storedHash)) throw new AuthException(); timing-safe comparison built-in; if (password_needs_rehash($hash, PASSWORD_ARGON2ID)) { rehash and update DB }

should_not_trigger: SQL injection prevention in Go with sqlc
